title: Amid concerns over high AI bills, OpenAI introduces new spending controls to help cut costs
description: OpenAI has introduced spending controls and usage analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise. This move allows companies to exercise tighter control over AI budgets as usage-based costs rise.

title: India News | Keralam Budget 2026-27: Rs 50 Cr Allocated for Gen-Z Startups, Rs 10 Cr for 'Malayalam AI'
description: Get latest articles and stories on India at LatestLY. Presenting the Budget in the Assembly, Satheesan emphasized that Malayalam must not be left behind in the era of Artificial Intelligence and announced that his government has allocated Rs 10 crore to develop an open Malayalam dataset and support the creation of indigenous AI models.

title: Kerala unveils Rs 50 crore Gen-Z startup fund, Malayalam AI mission as CM Satheesan pitches 'New Age Kerala'
description: Gen-Z Startups, Kerala budget, Kerala economy, Malayalam AI Initiative, VD Satheesan

title: UPS Expands AI to Improve Logistics Experience
description: UPS is expanding AI across its logistics network to improve shipment visibility, customer support, delivery predictability, and cross-border experiences. The post UPS Expands AI to Improve Logistics Experience appeared first on CXM Today .

title: "AI Can Never Replace Human Values": Piyush Goyal On The Coexistence Of Tech And Tradition
description: In a thoughtful reflection on the rapid rise of artificial intelligence, Commerce and Industry Minister Piyush Goyal asserted that technology will never supersede human intelligence, culture, and deep-rooted traditions. While emphasizing that the government is committed to making computer capability affordable to empower India's youth, Goyal maintained that certain roles- such as a master chef or a heritage guide require an inherent human touch that AI cannot replicate. He contrasted this with Western models, noting that in spiritual and family-oriented societies like India, there will always be a harmonious scope for technology to coexist with history.
